As the Norwegian Supreme Court grants Jehovah's Witnesses a landmark victory in their battle to promote mandatory shunning of former members while still receiving state subsidies and religious status, I explain where the three justices who swung the decision got it wrong.

Link to verdict: https://www.domstol.no/en/supremecourt/rulings/rulings-2026/supreme-court---civil-cases/HR-2026-1009-A/
